Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the long-term momentum rankings. LINC (rank #1, score 95.3) shows extraordinary consistency with a 1,362% 10-year return and passes all four momentum ratio thresholds, though its 5-year return of 520% suggests acceleration in recent years rather than sustained growth. ISSC (rank #2) demonstrates even more aggressive recent momentum with a 305% 1-year return and 4.31x ratio from 1-month to 3-month performance, indicating powerful acceleration despite a lower 5-year return of 345%. Both tickers are above all major moving averages (SMA30/50/100/200) and outpace SPY significantly across multiple timeframes, with ISSC showing particularly strong 1-year relative performance at 289% above SPY. The data suggests these are secular winners with strong structural tailwinds, though ISSC's concentration of gains in the shorter term warrants observation for sustainability compared to LINC's more balanced long-term appreciation.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
